name: oneCreditCard Python Development
postCreateCommand: (type -p wget >/dev/null || (sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install wget -y)) && sudo mkdir -p -m 755 /etc/apt/keyrings && wget -qO- https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg | sudo tee /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg > /dev/null && sudo chmod go+r /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list > /dev/null && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install gh -y && pip install -r requirements.txt && echo && echo '╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗' && echo '║                     🤖 AI CONTEXT REMINDER                   ║' && echo '║                                                              ║' && echo '║  Type in AI Chat: load AGENTS.md                             ║' && echo '║                                                              ║' && echo '║  This loads the complete project context for better AI       ║' && echo '║  assistance with oneCreditCard development.                  ║' && echo '╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝' && echo
